primaryGoal: Move unified-ai-system toward local self-use complete through bounded autonomous dry-run execution.
successPrinciples: Prefer small reversible tasks with verifier and evidence.
Keep provider calls, secrets, deploy, release, push, commit, and main-chain chat changes gated.
Generate approval packets for high-risk work instead of executing it.
Never count automated checks as real owner feedback or production validation.

nearTermGoals.title: Maintain project-brain state files
nearTermGoals.doneWhen: current-state, goals, risk-policy, next-actions, and completion-definition JSON files parse successfully.

nearTermGoals.title: Select next bounded local task
nearTermGoals.doneWhen: selector can return an allowed L0, L1, or L2 candidate without touching forbidden paths.

nearTermGoals.title: Block high-risk work
nearTermGoals.doneWhen: L3 tasks produce docs/approvals approval-required packets and do not execute.

nearTermGoals.title: Record execution evidence
nearTermGoals.doneWhen: each GVC run writes sanitized evidence with providerCallsMade=false and secretRead=false unless separately approved.

nearTermGoals.title: Dry-run queued local actions
nearTermGoals.doneWhen: task queue runner writes a decision ledger for L0/L1/L2 allowed actions and L3 approval-gated actions without real execution.

notGoals: No real Provider call in Phase2000.
No deploy, release, tag, push, commit, or artifact upload.
